anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Operating table centroid extracted from architect Rev-E theatre layout dated 2026-05-22; central position with surgical luminaire pendant; bed top at 1000mm AFF per equipment schedule.

zones._derivation_note: Group 2 patient envelope per §710: 1.5m radius cylinder around the patient position, 12-sided regular polygon approximation centred at (3000,2500). Height_min=0, height_max=2500mm covers the surgical working volume. RCD-protection NOT applied inside the envelope — Group 2 mandates a medical IT (insulated) system instead per §710. Sockets and switches in the envelope MUST be medical-isolating-socket type connected to the IT system.

electrical_constraints._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (IMD 8 s alarm response) + HTM 06-01 (NHS precedence)
electrical_constraints._derivation_note: Medical IT system required for the Group 2 patient envelope per §710 (no Part 7 sub-clauses valid; §710 top-level only). IMD per BS EN 61557-8 with 8 s alarm response. Isolating transformer at 5 kVA — within the 3.15-8 kVA plausibility band per D-4 (no flag raised). Supplementary bonding ≤0.2 Ω per §710. HTM 06-01 NHS technical memorandum takes precedence in NHS sites and defines safety_service_category 1 (no-break).

Supplementary equipotential bonding within the Group 2 patient environment per §710 + §701.415.2. Resistance ≤0.2 Ω (measured 0.15 Ω per input override). Bonding extends to operating table frame, anaesthesia machine ground, scrub sink, and any other metallic touchable surface in the envelope.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system. Synthetic upstream small-power intent supplies 6 medical_isolating_socket positions fed from the Group 2 medical IT supply.
All 6 sockets carry isolation_path: medical_it_panel — every circuit routed via the 5kVA isolating transformer + IMD per §710.
Socket height 1100mm AFF (typical OR convention; non-impact-protected anaesthetic-machine zone).
Group 2 patient envelope approximated as 12-sided regular polygon (1.5m radius cylinder) per the geometry-validation convention recorded in spec §5.7.
Isolating transformer sized at 5 kVA per input medical_it_system_override; within the 3.15-8 kVA plausibility band so no D-4 flag is raised.
Safety service category 1 (no-break) sourced from HTM 06-01 NHS technical memorandum, NOT from BS 7671 §710 (no such sub-clause exists in the verified file).

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (patient_1) produces 1 zone (medical_envelope_group_2). No overlaps with sibling zones (single zone).

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 6 entries (consumed from upstream small-power intent: 6 medical_isolating_socket positions on the medical IT supply), all compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] is empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds (zero violations on both sides).

medical_envelope_group_2 zone present; sibling medical_it_system constraint present with applies_to_zone_ids=[zone_patient_1_envelope_g2] AND imd_alarm_response_time_s_max=8 AND supplementary_bonding_max_resistance_ohm=0.2 per BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8. Also satisfies the schema-level allOf if/then enforcing this combination.
room_type=medical_group_2_theatre, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket N/A — INV-04 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
Not a pool hall. §702.415.1 main bonding N/A.

6 medical_isolating_sockets consumed from upstream small-power intent + audited against §710 medical envelope. Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: medical_isolating_socket permitted by §710 when fed from medical IT supply (isolation_path field records the IT-panel hand-off). Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: IPx4 (OR convention; cleanable). Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: N/A. Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ 230V. All sockets sit OUTSIDE the 1500mm radius envelope cylinder in plan (min distance ~1500mm to envelope edge at the closest socket). 24 sub-rule evaluations PASS.
compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no silent overlaps. Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 example #6 (uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system) for the small-power consumer. Upstream small-power intent supplies 6 medical_isolating_socket positions fed from the Group 2 medical IT supply. All compliant against §710 envelope. Demonstrates small-power INV-12 PASS hand-off + medical IT distribution chain.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 standalone uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system for the small-power consumer. Upstream small-power intent (synthetic at electrical/small-power/examples/uk-medical-or-cascade-source/intent-out.json) supplies 6 medical_isolating_socket positions at z=1100mm (typical OR socket height), all on the medical IT supply via isolation_path: medical_it_panel. The 5kVA isolating transformer, IMD with 8s alarm, and ≤0.15Ω supplementary bonding (C.1 source) are unchanged. Cascade hand-off wires existing_fixtures_audit[] to mirror the 6 consumed sockets.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §710 Group 2 medical locations: medical IT system per §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (8s IMD alarm). HTM 06-01 (NHS) precedence. Supplementary equipotential bonding ≤0.2Ω per IEC 60364-7-710. Medical isolating sockets are explicitly permitted by §710 when fed from the medical IT supply (NOT general LV).

sections.title: INV-08 sub-rule walk-through
sections.summary: Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: medical_isolating_socket permitted by §710 when on medical IT supply (isolation_path: medical_it_panel records this hand-off). Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: IPx4 (cleanable OR convention). Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: N/A (envelope does not impose distance rule on sockets fed from IT supply). Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ envelope max 230V. 24/24 sub-rule evaluations PASS. All 6 sockets sit OUTSIDE the 1500mm radius envelope cylinder in plan.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off
sections.summary: When small-power v1.2 consumes this special-locations intent, INV-12 iterates over each consumed socket and verifies it does NOT violate any derived zone. All 6 fixtures audit as compliant; INV-12 PASSes. db-layout INV-16 sub-check 4 fires because medical_it_system is in electrical_constraints[]: every circuit serving these sockets must connect via the modelled medical_it_panel in the db-layout output IR (NOT general LV distribution).

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Synthetic upstream intent. The medical IT supply hand-off is recorded via the isolation_path: medical_it_panel marker on each socket; the actual circuit-to-panel routing is db-layout's responsibility (INV-16 sub-check 4). The C.1 source records 5kVA transformer (within §710 3.15-8kVA plausibility band, no D-4) + IMD 8s alarm (at limit) + ≤0.15Ω supplementary bonding (well within 0.2Ω limit, no D-3); all carried forward.
